entities.name: Client
entities.context: Represents the user or application initiating a connection

entities.name: Client2
entities.context: Represents another user or application connecting to the proxy

entities.name: Proxy
entities.context: Acts as an intermediary for client connections

relationships.context: Proxy informs the client about the opened port
Proxy provides information about Client2 to the original client
Establishes a TCP stream between them through the proxy
Proxy serves as a connection point between Client and Client2
